[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101000 2
1 10001001 3
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 11010010 4
5 10110100 4
6 10010110 4
7 11111011 7

01 10 10010000 2
12 21 10010100 3
23 32 10010010 3
34 43 00001010 2
45 54 00000100 1
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00001000 1
70 07 10000000 1

02 20 10010010 3
13 31 10110000 3
24 42 00000110 2
35 53 11110000 4
46 64 00001000 1
57 75 10000000 1
60 06 00000000 a match 2 3
71 17 10000000 1

03 30 11010010 4 match 4
14 41 00000100 1
25 52 10010100 3
36 63 00101000 2 match 0
47 74 00001000 1
50 05 11010000 3
61 16 00100000 1
72 27 10000000 1

04 40 00000010 1
15 51 10110100 4 match 5
26 62 00000000 a match 2 3
37 73 10001001 3 match 1
